programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A grieving father attacks his three-year-old son's killer in court; a judge screams expletives at a disruptive member of the gallery; a wheelchair-ridden defendant runs for it before entering court.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments; a judge takes down a violent offender with his own hands; a renegade zookeeper confronts his former employees in court; a lawyer's outrageous behavior leaves her colleagues and her client shocked.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his wife defends himself in court; fists fly in a Massachusetts court room; a so-called sovereign citizen comes face to face with a taser.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A shocking road rage incident captured on video leads to an even stranger court appearance; a convicted murderer admits to killing his own cellmate; a judge charges an alleged domestic violence victim with contempt of court.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A son and daughter denounce their murderous father; a drunken driver breaks down in court; a misbehaving spectator feels the judge's wrath.

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: The girlfriend of a convict sneaks a gift of methamphetamine into court; a public defender loses his virtual cool during a bond hearing; a shocking carjacking spree leads to an even more shocking moment of courtroom video.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An impossible interrogation room escape; a drunken driver keeps getting off; a judge strikes fear in everyone who appears before her.

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man just sentenced for drug possession and assaulting a Police Officer hurls expletives at the judge as he leaves the courtroom; the judge adjourns a pre-trial hearing because she suspects that the defendant is drunk.

programme.title: Southern Law
